Symbols

Common dream symbols by theme.

A production site can expand each symbol into an SEO page. This preview shows the structure.

Elements

Water, fire, sky

Emotions, pressure, movement, and transition.

Objects

Teeth, keys, money

Control, access, value, and self-expression.

Life scenes

House, wedding, flying

Identity, commitment, freedom, and distance.
